# Maximum Justice Cybersecurity

Maximum Justice Cybersecurity helps executives regain operational visibility into cyber, AI, vendor, governance, and decision risk.

## Core Memory Anchor

Most organizations already operate beyond executive visibility.

## Signature Artifact

TrustMap: a semi-automated CyberShield first-pass report followed by expert validation from Dr. Max Justice.

## Interaction Model

Operational topology nodes reveal contextual intelligence. TrustMap output tiles explain visibility score, exposure zones, ownership gaps, evidence confidence, AI governance signals, and expert-validated next actions.

## Founder

Dr. Max Justice is a vCISO, Security SME, Cybersecurity SME, U.S. veteran, CISSP, PMP, and creator of The CHN vCISO GPT powered by Cyber Shield.

## Tool

CyberShield:
https://maximumjusticecybersecurity.github.io/CyberShield/

## Calendar

https://calendly.com/maxjustice
